$comment: Repo-level MCP server configuration. Read by Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-aware clients. Mirrored to .vscode/mcp.json for VS Code Copilot and to .cursor/mcp.json for Cursor.

codegraph.$comment: CodeGraph — semantic code intelligence: symbol lookup, callers/callees, route mapping. scaffold.sh writes a project-specific copy of this file with --path baked in to the absolute project path, so every MCP client works correctly. VS Code Copilot uses .vscode/mcp.json (which keeps ${workspaceFolder}). See docs/guides/MCP_SETUP.md.
